mapper.sql: SELECT r.rental_id, r.device_id, r.branch_id, b.branch_name, r.status_rent, r.req_date, r.exp_start_date, r.exp_return_date, r.receipt_date, r.return_date, r.is_worn, r.user_id, r.created_at, u.user_name, d.model_id, dm.model_name, d.battery_level FROM rental r LEFT JOIN branch b ON r.branch_id = b.branch_id LEFT JOIN user u ON r.user_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN device d ON r.device_id = d.device_id LEFT JOIN device_model dm ON d.model_id = dm.model_id
mapper.select: WHERE r.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY r.created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO rental (device_id, branch_id, status_rent, req_date, exp_start_date, exp_return_date, receipt_date, return_date, is_worn, user_id, created_at) VALUES (#{deviceId}, #{branchId}, IFNULL(#{statusRent}, 0), IFNULL(#{reqDate}, NOW()), #{expStartDate}, #{expReturnDate}, #{receiptDate}, #{returnDate}, IFNULL(#{isWorn}, 'N'), #{userId}, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE rental SET deleted_at = NOW() WHERE rental_id = #{rentalId}
